name: @cobuild/repo-tools
description: Shared repository operations tools for Cobuild repos

scripts.typecheck: node --check test/repo-tools.test.mjs && bash -n bin/cobuild-open-exec-plan bin/cobuild-close-exec-plan bin/cobuild-doc-gardening bin/cobuild-check-agent-docs-drift bin/cobuild-committer bin/cobuild-update-changelog bin/cobuild-generate-release-notes bin/cobuild-release-package src/open-exec-plan.sh src/close-exec-plan.sh src/doc-gardening.sh src/check-agent-docs-drift.sh src/committer.sh src/update-changelog.sh src/generate-release-notes.sh src/release-package.sh scripts/committer scripts/release.sh scripts/update-changelog.sh scripts/generate-release-notes.sh
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm pack --dry-run
